g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does internet traffic reach the Application Load Balancer?')
sendPrompt('What does an ALB listener do?')
sendPrompt('How does HTTPS termination work on an ALB?')

g.text: protocol: HTTP port: 8080 health check: GET /health → 200

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the ALB determine if an EC2 instance is healthy?')
sendPrompt('What routing algorithm does the ALB use by default?')
sendPrompt('What happens to traffic when an EC2 instance fails its health check?')
sendPrompt('How do I use a custom domain with an Application Load Balancer?')
g.text: ALB has no static IP — always use the DNS name
point your Route 53 record to the ALB DNS name using an Alias record
